message:
Fix nightly clippy lints in test modules

Apply the same nightly clippy lint fixes to all test files:

- Format string interpolation in assertions and error messages
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to unused test fixture functions
  (usage_snapshot_minimal, credits_snapshot_minimal, cost_payload_minimal,
   load_fixture_json)
- Add #[allow(clippy::significant_drop_tightening)] in log_capture
- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)] on test duration casts
- Add #[allow(clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref)] on LogLevel::color_code
- Replace .map(...).unwrap_or(false) with .is_ok_and() in logger.rs
- Replace .map(PathBuf::from).unwrap_or_else with .map_or_else
- Merge nested if-let chains in write_to_file
- Doc comment backtick fixes (serde_json::Value)

Tests affected: common/fixtures, common/log_capture, common/logger,
e2e_cost_test, e2e_errors_test, e2e_history_test, e2e_usage_test,
fixtures_test, history_integration_test, http_client_test,
provider_render_pipeline_test, schema_contract_test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
